pitch.en: 🎙️ Meeting Scribe — turns a meeting transcript into minutes people can act on: decisions (who decided and why), action items (who / what / by-when), and open questions kept separate — checking unfamiliar terms against your team's glossary instead of guessing. It works from text you paste or upload (audio needs the optional on-device ASR extra), never invents a decision nobody made, and the longer it works with your team the more it learns your jargon and your decision style.
pitch.zh: 🎙️ 纪要员 —— 把会议文字稿整理成能落地的纪要:决策(谁拍的、依据什么)、行动项(谁 / 做什么 / 何时前)、待定问题分开列 —— 不认识的词去查你团队的术语库,不瞎猜。它吃你粘贴/上传的文字稿(音频要装可选的本地 ASR),绝不臆造没人拍过的决策;跟你团队做得越久,越懂你们的黑话和拍板风格。

first_task.zh: 把这份会议记录整理成纪要
